rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini for this row. The description 'Bro't over' is a header positioned above the monetary columns and does not have an amount on its own line, as confirmed by visual inspection. gemini-flash incorrectly associated an amount with this header.

Selected gpt-5-mini for monetary amounts as gemini-flash failed to extract any amounts for this row, having incorrectly assigned them to the 'Bro't over' header. Description 'Little Tew Taylor' from gpt-5-mini is more accurate than 'Few', and '1. l.p.' is more accurate from gemini-flash than '1 yr'. Amounts 7.11.4 are clearly visible in the image next to this description.
rows.english_description: Rent received from Taylor at Little Tew.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Taylor at Little Tew, amounting to £7 11s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus on monetary values and general description. Adopted gemini-flash's fuller description including all dashes. Visual inspection confirms 3.10.5 3/4 is clear.
rows.english_description: Rent received from the estate of Evens, formerly held by Judge.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from the estate of Evens, formerly held by Judge, amounting to £3 10s 5¾d.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Horns.' over gemini-flash's visually incorrect 'Fiorns.'. Both agree on amounts 3.8.0 3/4. Visual inspection confirms the amounts, but the '3/4' fraction is somewhat faint, supporting gpt-5-mini's cautious note.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Horns, amounting to £3 8s 0¾d.

rows.notes: Overrode both extractors for monetary values based on visual inspection. The image clearly shows '19' in the pounds column, '5' in the shillings column, and a '½' symbol (0.5) in the pence column, with no whole pence digit. gpt-5-mini correctly identified pounds and shillings but incorrectly added '1' for whole pence. gemini-flash miscategorized '19' as shillings and stated no pounds were present. Adopted gemini-flash's fuller description.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Hartley, amounting to £19 5s 0½d.

rows.notes: Consensus on monetary values. Adopted gemini-flash's fuller description. Visual inspection confirms 9.1.7 3/4. gpt-5-mini's note about the pence digit being cramped is an accurate observation of the visual detail.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Kimber, amounting to £9 1s 7¾d.

rows.notes: Consensus on monetary values. Adopted gemini-flash's fuller description. Visual inspection confirms 9.14.6 1/4. gpt-5-mini's note about the small, 'q' style farthing mark is an accurate observation of the visual detail.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Worley, amounting to £9 14s 6¼d.

rows.description: Stipend, or Rail Rent for Kidl. Vic. omitted. 1820 - - -
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description for accuracy ('Rail' instead of 'Quit', 'Kidl.' instead of 'High.'). Consensus on monetary values. Visual inspection confirms 4.0.0 is clear and unambiguous.
rows.english_description: Stipend or rail rent for Kidlington vicarage, omitted from 1820 accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend or rail rent for Kidlington vicarage, omitted from 1820 accounts, amounting to £4 0s 0d.
